clean_text: Discover Weekly used to be amazing but now it just plays the same 20 songs every single week. I want to find new music, not hear the same stuff on repeat. This feature feels completely broken.
I absolutely love Spotify. The Daily Mix playlists are perfectly tailored to my taste and I discover new artists every day through them. Best music app by far.
The app works fine but Radio keeps suggesting artists I already listen to. I was hoping it would help me branch out and find music I have never heard. A bit disappointing.

Anyone else notice that Spotify recommendations have gotten worse? Used to find hidden gems through Discover Weekly. Now it just recommends top 40 hits I could find anywhere. Really frustrating for someone who wants to explore niche genres.
Great app overall. The playlist creation tools are easy to use and I like being able to follow friends. Would give 5 stars but the ads on the free tier are too frequent.
I cannot find any new music anymore. Every playlist they make for me has songs I have already heard a thousand times. What happened to this app? I am thinking of switching to a competitor.
Just joined Spotify after being on Apple Music for years. Still figuring out all the features. The interface is clean and it was easy to import my playlists.

The music quality is good but I feel like I am stuck in a bubble. The algorithm only shows me stuff from artists I already know. I want to explore but the app makes it hard to stumble on something truly new.
Spotify is perfect for my morning runs. The tempo-matched playlists keep me motivated and the app never crashes. Five stars.

I use Spotify for about 6 hours a day. The personalization used to be top tier. Lately though Discover Weekly and Release Radar have been missing the mark. The songs feel generic and do not match my actual listening history at all.
